title: KNOWN extensions list decoupled from evaluator — will diverge again
description: The envelope extension was already missing from KNOWN despite being implemented in the evaluator. The list is a hardcoded const in compile() with no structural tie to what the evaluator actually handles. Every new extension implementation requires separately updating KNOWN or require["new-ext"] will fail at compile. The fix is to define the known-extension list at the evaluator layer and consult it from compile(), so they cannot diverge.
